# In Parallel

> In Parallel is an intelligent management system that connects to your existing tools and meetings to maintain a living execution plan — automatically.

In Parallel connects to the tools your teams already use to give you an always up-to-date home for every team, project and program — without manual coordination.

Website: https://www.in-parallel.com
Contact: hello@in-parallel.com

---

## Product Overview

In Parallel is an intelligent management system that connects to your tools and meetings — and turns decisions, priorities, and ownership into a living execution plan. The system keeps that plan current as work evolves, so you always know what matters now, who owns what, and what changed — without manual coordination.

### How It Works

In Parallel saves 6–8 hours per manager, every week by turning meetings and systems into a shared reality.

**1. Prepare (Before meetings)**
AI prepares you to join your meetings by surfacing hot topics, risks, and overdue items from plans and connected systems.

**2. Capture (During meetings)**
AI detects decisions, ownership changes, deadlines, and commitments.

**3. Update (After meetings)**
Captured items automatically flow into the execution plan and generate reports — automatically.

**4. Report (Always)**
Living execution plans stay current. Dashboards, OKR tracking, and risk signals update without manual work.

---

## Integrations

In Parallel integrates into your existing tool stack and meeting cadence — so execution stays current without changing how your teams work. No migrations, just connection.

- **Microsoft 365 Copilot** — Connect all your work items on Microsoft 365.
- **Microsoft Teams** — Transcribe your calls and chats.
- **Microsoft SharePoint** — Easily attach files to tasks to keep teams and work connected.
- **Microsoft PowerBI** — Access your existing business intelligence and analytics.
- **Microsoft Outlook** — Sync your task and project deadlines to your Outlook calendar.
- **Slack** — Get updates, create and delegate tasks without leaving Slack.
- **Google Workspace** — Connect your Google apps for seamless workflow.
- **Linear** — Connect your modern software development.
- **HubSpot** — Connect your CRM and marketing intelligence.
- **Salesforce** — Connect your CRM and marketing intelligence.
- **Asana** — Connect your project management workflows.
- **Jira** — Sync with your existing issue tracking and project management.

Don't see yours? In Parallel will add it or map a CSV.

---

## Pricing

Flexible plans that grow with your organization.

- **Starter** — For small teams getting started. Contact us for pricing.
- **Growth** (Most popular) — For scaling organizations. Contact us for pricing.
- **Enterprise** — Custom deployment and support. Contact us for pricing.

Book a demo: https://www.in-parallel.com/demo

---

## Security & Compliance

In Parallel is built for enterprise trust. No models are trained with your company information — only your management system is made more intelligent. Your data stays where it is.

### Certifications & Standards

- **ISO 27001** — Information security management certified.
- **ISO 42001** — AI management system certified.
- **SOC 2 Type II** — Audited and attested security controls.
- **GDPR Compliant** — Full compliance with EU data protection regulations.

### Enterprise Features

- SSO/SAML/SCIM authentication
- Role-based access control (RBAC)
- Full audit logs
- Data residency options
- DPIA documentation out of the box

---

## Company

Founded in 2023, In Parallel is based in Helsinki, Finland.

**Mission**: Empower organizations and individuals to do the right things right.

**Vision**: Lead a new generation of enterprise software that equips large companies to thrive in the face of complexity and change.

The team are builders with deep experience in enterprise software, product, and go-to-market — focused on compounding learning across large organizations.

**Investors**: Lifeline Ventures, Notion Capital, and a group of private investors.

### Careers

In Parallel is building the next generation of enterprise software from Helsinki, Finland. If you're excited about AI, execution intelligence, and enterprise-scale challenges, reach out at careers@in-parallel.com.
